edges: Login Interface -> Authentication Service : forwards credentials (message)
Authentication Service -> User Database : load matching record (message)
User Database -> Authentication Service : user record (reply)
Authentication Service -> Login Interface : access token (reply)
Login Interface -> User : notify successful login (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "Login Process") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "Login Interface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDb = lifeline(name = "User Database")

    message(from = loginInterface, to = authService, label = "forwards credentials")
    message(from = authService, to = userDb, label = "load matching record")
    reply(from = userDb, to = authService, label = "user record")
    reply(from = authService, to = loginInterface, label = "access token")
    message(from = loginInterface, to = user, label = "notify successful login")
}

sequenceDiagram(name = "BankTransfer") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val bankingApp = lifeline(name = "Banking App")
    val transferService = lifeline(name = "Transfer Service")
    val accountDatabase = lifeline(name = "Account Database")

    message(from = customer, to = bankingApp, label = "initiateTransfer()")
    message(from = bankingApp, to = transferService, label = "submitTransferRequest()")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDatabase, label = "queryAccountBalance()")
    reply(from = accountDatabase, to = transferService, label = "currentBalance")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDatabase, label = "postTransfer()")
    reply(from = accountDatabase, to = transferService, label = "bookingConfirmed")
    reply(from = transferService, to = bankingApp, label = "transactionReference")
    reply(from = bankingApp, to = customer, label = "displayConfirmation()")
}

sequenceDiagram(name = "Web Shop Search Flow") {
    val buyer = lifeline(name = "Buyer") { isActor = true }
    val webShop = lifeline(name = "WebShop")
    val searchService = lifeline(name = "SearchService")
    val productCatalog = lifeline(name = "ProductCatalog")

    message(from = buyer, to = webShop, label = "enters search term")
    message(from = webShop, to = searchService, label = "search(term)")
    message(from = searchService, to = productCatalog, label = "findMatchingProducts(term)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = searchService, label = "matchingProducts")
    reply(from = searchService, to = webShop, label = "searchResults")
    message(from = webShop, to = productCatalog, label = "loadProductImages(productIds)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = webShop, label = "productImages")
    message(from = webShop, to = buyer, label = "display results page")
}

edges: Client -> API Gateway : Request Data via API (message)
API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : Check Client Quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : Quota Exhausted (reply)
API Gateway -> Client : Reject: Too Many Requests (message)
Client -> API Gateway : Retry Request Data (Attempt 2) (message)
API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : Check Client Quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : Quota Available (reply)
API Gateway -> Backend Service : Forward Request to Backend (message)
Backend Service -> API Gateway : Return Data (reply)
API Gateway -> Client : Return Data to Client (reply)
User -> Web Portal : Request password reset (email) (message)
Web Portal -> Authentication Service : Process password reset request (message)
Authentication Service -> User Database : Lookup email address (message)
User Database -> Authentication Service : User data / Not found (reply)
Authentication Service -> User Database : Generate and store reset token (if user exists) (message)
User Database -> Authentication Service : Token stored (reply)
Authentication Service -> Email Service : Trigger send reset email (async) (message)
Authentication Service -> Web Portal : Innocuous success message (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "PasswordResetFlow") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val webPortal = lifeline(name = "Web Portal")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDb = lifeline(name = "User Database")
    val emailService = lifeline(name = "Email Service")

    message(from = user, to = webPortal, label = "Request password reset (email)")
    message(from = webPortal, to = authService, label = "Process password reset request")
    message(from = authService, to = userDb, label = "Lookup email address")
    reply(from = userDb, to = authService, label = "User data / Not found")
    message(from = authService, to = userDb, label = "Generate and store reset token (if user exists)")
    reply(from = userDb, to = authService, label = "Token stored")
    message(from = authService, to = emailService, label = "Trigger send reset email (async)")
    reply(from = authService, to = webPortal, label = "Innocuous success message")
    reply(from = webPortal, to = user, label = "Neutral notification")
}

edges: TokenCache -> APIGateway : token not found in cache (reply)
APIGateway -> TokenCache : store token as valid in cache (message)
APIGateway -> OrderService : forward request to order service (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "OrderProcessingWithAuth") {
    val client = lifeline(name = "Client") { isActor = true }
    val apiGateway = lifeline(name = "APIGateway")
    val tokenCache = lifeline(name = "TokenCache")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "AuthService")
    val orderService = lifeline(name = "OrderService")

    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "call order endpoint (JWT)")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = tokenCache, label = "check token cache (JWT)")
    reply(from = tokenCache, to = apiGateway, label = "token not found in cache")

    message(from = apiGateway, to = authService, label = "verify token (JWT)")
    reply(from = authService, to = apiGateway, label = "token is valid")

    message(from = apiGateway, to = tokenCache, label = "store token as valid in cache")
    // No explicit reply shown for store in example, so none added here.

    message(from = apiGateway, to = orderService, label = "forward request to order service")
    reply(from = orderService, to = apiGateway, label = "order list")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "order list")
}

sequenceDiagram(name = "OrderProcessingSaga") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val orderService = lifeline(name = "OrderService")
    val sagaOrchestrator = lifeline(name = "SagaOrchestrator")
    val eventLog = lifeline(name = "EventLog")
    val warehouseService = lifeline(name = "WarehouseService")
    val paymentService = lifeline(name = "PaymentService")
    val shipmentService = lifeline(name = "ShipmentService")

    message(from = customer, to = orderService, label = "placeOrder()")
    reply(from = orderService, to = customer, label = "orderReceived")

    message(from = orderService, to = sagaOrchestrator, label = "instantiateSaga()")
    reply(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = orderService, label = "sagaInstantiated")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logEvent(SAGA_STARTED)")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = warehouseService, label = "reserveItems()")
    reply(from = warehouseService, to = sagaOrchestrator, label = "itemsReserved(true)")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logEvent(ITEMS_RESERVED)")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = paymentService, label = "executePayment()")
    reply(from = paymentService, to = sagaOrchestrator, label = "paymentFailed()")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logEvent(PAYMENT_FAILED)")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = warehouseService, label = "cancelReservation()")
    reply(from = warehouseService, to = sagaOrchestrator, label = "reservationCancelled()")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = eventLog, label = "logEvent(RESERVATION_CANCELLED)")

    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = customer, label = "orderStatus(ABORTED_PAYMENT_FAILED)")
    message(from = sagaOrchestrator, to = orderService, label = "sagaAborted()")
    reply(from = orderService, to = sagaOrchestrator, label = "tearDownOrchestrator()")
}

edges: Client App -> Browser : redirect to AuthZ Server (message)
AuthZ Server -> Session Store : create session (message)
Session Store -> AuthZ Server : session created (reply)
AuthZ Server -> Browser : deliver login form (message)
AuthZ Server -> Browser : issue auth code (redirect) (message)
Browser -> Client App : authorization code callback (message)
Client App -> AuthZ Server : exchange code for token (message)
AuthZ Server -> Audit Log : log token issuance (message)
AuthZ Server -> Client App : access token (reply)
Client App -> Resource Server : request user profile (message)
Resource Server -> AuthZ Server : verify token (message)
AuthZ Server -> Resource Server : token valid (reply)
Resource Server -> Client App : user profile data (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "User Login Flow") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val clientApp = lifeline(name = "Client App")
    val browser = lifeline(name = "Browser")
    val authzServer = lifeline(name = "AuthZ Server")
    val sessionStore = lifeline(name = "Session Store")
    val auditLog = lifeline(name = "Audit Log")
    val resourceServer = lifeline(name = "Resource Server")

    message(from = user, to = clientApp, label = "initiates login")
    message(from = clientApp, to = browser, label = "redirect to AuthZ Server")
    message(from = browser, to = authzServer, label = "login request")

    message(from = authzServer, to = sessionStore, label = "create session")
    reply(from = sessionStore, to = authzServer, label = "session created")

    message(from = authzServer, to = browser, label = "deliver login form")

    message(from = browser, to = authzServer, label = "submit credentials")

    message(from = authzServer, to = browser, label = "issue auth code (redirect)")
    message(from = browser, to = clientApp, label = "authorization code callback")

    message(from = clientApp, to = authzServer, label = "exchange code for token")
    message(from = authzServer, to = auditLog, label = "log token issuance")
    reply(from = authzServer, to = clientApp, label = "access token")

    message(from = clientApp, to = resourceServer, label = "request user profile")
    message(from = resourceServer, to = authzServer, label = "verify token")
    reply(from = authzServer, to = resourceServer, label = "token valid")
    reply(from = resourceServer, to = clientApp, label = "user profile data")
}

edges: Camera Sensor -> Fusion Unit : measurement data (message)
Radar Sensor -> Fusion Unit : measurement data (message)
Fusion Unit -> Emergency Braking Assistant : collision risk with TTC (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Driver : Acoustic Warning (TTC < threshold) (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Control Unit : Initiate Autonomous Braking (TTC < threshold) (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Control Unit : Adjust brake pressure repeatedly (message)
Control Unit -> Emergency Braking Assistant : Vehicle stationary (reply)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Diagnostic Log : Record braking event in diagnostic log (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Driver : Distance Warning (TTC >= threshold) (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Diagnostic Log : Log observed risk (concurrently) (TTC >= threshold) (message)
Parking Garage Operator -> Parking Garage Management System (relationship)
Parking Garage Management System -> Payment Terminal Network (relationship)
Video Streaming Platform -> Licensing & DRM Service (relationship)

finalCode:
import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "BicycleSystem") {
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "Braking System")
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "Rear Wheel")
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "Front Wheel")

    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }

    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "Steering Assembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }

    val bicycle = partDef(name = "Bicycle") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steeringAssembly", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "BicycleSystem BDD") {
        include(bicycle)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
    }
}

Structure and Thermal Control -> Solar Panels (composition)
Structure and Thermal Control -> Heat Shield (composition)
Electrical Power Supply -> Solar Power Regulator (composition)
Electronic Control Unit (ECU) -> AUTOSAR BSW Layer (composition)

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR_ECU") {
    // Abstract base types
    val communicationController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller", isAbstract = true)
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module", isAbstract = true)

    // Hardware Layer components
    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flashMemory = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")

    val microcontroller = partDef(name = "Microcontroller") {
        part(name = "cpu", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flash", typeId = flashMemory.id)
    }

    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val ethernetController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)

    val hardwareLayer = partDef(name = "Hardware Layer") {
        part(name = "microcontroller", typeId = microcontroller.id)
        part(name = "canController", typeId = canController.id)
        part(name = "linController", typeId = linController.id)
        part(name = "ethernetController", typeId = ethernetController.id)
    }

    // AUTOSAR BSW Layer components
    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val canCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "CAN Communication Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val ethernetCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Communication Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val os = partDef(name = "OS", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val watchdog = partDef(name = "Watchdog", specializesId = bswModule.id)

    val communicationStacks = partDef(name = "Communication Stacks") {
        part(name = "canStack", typeId = canCommunicationStack.id)
        part(name = "ethStack", typeId = ethernetCommunicationStack.id)
    }

    val systemServices = partDef(name = "System Services") {
        part(name = "os", typeId = os.id)
        part(name = "watchdog", typeId = watchdog.id)
    }

    val bswLayer = partDef(name = "AUTOSAR BSW Layer") {
        part(name = "mcal", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "communicationStacks", typeId = communicationStacks.id)
        part(name = "systemServices", typeId = systemServices.id)
    }

    // Application Layer components
    val softwareComponent = partDef(name = "Software Component")
    val vfb = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")

    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "softwareComponent", typeId = softwareComponent.id)
        part(name = "vfb", typeId = vfb.id)
    }

    // Top-level ECU
    val ecu = partDef(name = "Electronic Control Unit (ECU)") {
        part(name = "hardwareLayer", typeId = hardwareLayer.id)
        part(name = "bswLayer", typeId = bswLayer.id)
        part(name = "applicationLayer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU Block Definition Diagram") {
        include(definition = ecu)
        include(definition = hardwareLayer)
        include(definition = microcontroller)
        include(definition = cpuCore)
        include(definition = ram)
        include(definition = flashMemory)
        include(definition = communicationController)
        include(definition = canController)
        include(definition = linController)
        include(definition = ethernetController)
        include(definition = bswLayer)
        include(definition = bswModule)
        include(definition = mcal)
        include(definition = communicationStacks)
        include(definition = canCommunicationStack)
        include(definition = ethernetCommunicationStack)
        include(definition = systemServices)
        include(definition = os)
        include(definition = watchdog)
        include(definition = applicationLayer)
        include(definition = softwareComponent)
        include(definition = vfb)
    }
}

edges: Processing Platform Subsystem -> Safety Monitoring Computer (composition)
Localization and Mapping Subsystem -> HD Map Unit (composition)
Localization and Mapping Subsystem -> Real-Time Localization Module (composition)
Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem -> Path Planning Module (composition)
Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem -> Behavior Decision Module (composition)
Autonomous Vehicle System -> Processing Platform Subsystem (composition)
Autonomous Vehicle System -> Localization and Mapping Subsystem (composition)
Autonomous Vehicle System -> Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem (composition)
Autonomous Vehicle System -> Vehicle Control Subsystem (composition)
finalCode:
import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AutonomousVehicleArchitecture") {
    // 1. Perception Subsystem components
    val perceptionSensor = partDef(name = "Perception Sensor", isAbstract = true)
    val cameraCluster = partDef(name = "Camera Cluster", specializesId = perceptionSensor.id)
    val radarArray = partDef(name = "Radar Array", specializesId = perceptionSensor.id)
    val lidarScanner = partDef(name = "Lidar Scanner", specializesId = perceptionSensor.id)
    val gpsIns = partDef(name = "GPS/INS", specializesId = perceptionSensor.id)

    val perceptionSubsystem = partDef(name = "Perception Subsystem") {
        part(name = "cameraCluster", typeId = cameraCluster.id)
        part(name = "radarArray", typeId = radarArray.id)
        part(name = "lidarScanner", typeId = lidarScanner.id)
        part(name = "gpsIns", typeId = gpsIns.id)
    }

    // 2. Processing Platform Subsystem components
    val gpu = partDef(name = "GPU")
    val cpu = partDef(name = "CPU")
    val dram = partDef(name = "DRAM")
    val avCompute = partDef(name = "AV Compute") {
        part(name = "gpu", typeId = gpu.id)
        part(name = "cpu", typeId = cpu.id)
        part(name = "dram", typeId = dram.id)
    }
    val safetyMonitoringComputer = partDef(name = "Safety Monitoring Computer")

    val processingPlatformSubsystem = partDef(name = "Processing Platform Subsystem") {
        part(name = "avCompute", typeId = avCompute.id)
        part(name = "safetyMonitoringComputer", typeId = safetyMonitoringComputer.id)
    }

    // 3. Localization and Mapping Subsystem components
    val hdMapUnit = partDef(name = "HD Map Unit")
    val realTimeLocalizationModule = partDef(name = "Real-Time Localization Module")

    val localizationAndMappingSubsystem = partDef(name = "Localization and Mapping Subsystem") {
        part(name = "hdMapUnit", typeId = hdMapUnit.id)
        part(name = "realTimeLocalizationModule", typeId = realTimeLocalizationModule.id)
    }

    // 4. Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem components
    val pathPlanningModule = partDef(name = "Path Planning Module")
    val behaviorDecisionModule = partDef(name = "Behavior Decision Module")

    val drivingDecisionAndPlanningSubsystem = partDef(name = "Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem") {
        part(name = "pathPlanningModule", typeId = pathPlanningModule.id)
        part(name = "behaviorDecisionModule", typeId = behaviorDecisionModule.id)
    }

    // 5. Vehicle Control Subsystem components
    val steerByWireUnit = partDef(name = "Steer-by-Wire Unit")
    val brakeByWireUnit = partDef(name = "Brake-by-Wire Unit")
    val driveControl = partDef(name = "Drive Control")

    val vehicleControlSubsystem = partDef(name = "Vehicle Control Subsystem") {
        part(name = "steerByWireUnit", typeId = steerByWireUnit.id)
        part(name = "brakeByWireUnit", typeId = brakeByWireUnit.id)
        part(name = "driveControl", typeId = driveControl.id)
    }

    // 6. Communication Subsystem components
    val v2xModule = partDef(name = "V2X Module")
    val telematicsModule = partDef(name = "Telematics Module")

    val communicationSubsystem = partDef(name = "Communication Subsystem") {
        part(name = "v2xModule", typeId = v2xModule.id)
        part(name = "telematicsModule", typeId = telematicsModule.id)
    }

    // Top-level Autonomous Vehicle System
    val autonomousVehicleSystem = partDef(name = "Autonomous Vehicle System") {
        part(name = "perception", typeId = perceptionSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "processingPlatform", typeId = processingPlatformSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "localizationAndMapping", typeId = localizationAndMappingSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "drivingDecisionAndPlanning", typeId = drivingDecisionAndPlanningSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "vehicleControl", typeId = vehicleControlSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "communication", typeId = communicationSubsystem.id)
    }

    // BDD block to include all partDefs
    bdd(name = "Autonomous Vehicle System BDD") {
        include(autonomousVehicleSystem)
        include(perceptionSubsystem)
        include(processingPlatformSubsystem)
        include(localizationAndMappingSubsystem)
        include(drivingDecisionAndPlanningSubsystem)
        include(vehicleControlSubsystem)
        include(communicationSubsystem)

        include(perceptionSensor)
        include(cameraCluster)
        include(radarArray)
        include(lidarScanner)
        include(gpsIns)
